gist.headline: Daily README Refresh
gist.blurb: Our trusty bot updated the README with the latest news and community apps.
gist.summary: Automated daily update to the README file to reflect the latest news and recent community applications.
gist.impact: Keeps the repository's landing page fresh with the latest community highlights and project updates.
gist.visual_concept: A cute robot bot updating a giant pixelated scroll or book (the README) while the bee mascot watches. The robot is stamping new pictures onto the pages.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a cute chunky robot with a CRT monitor head stamping new pictures onto a giant glowing scroll, while the bee mascot watches happily. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley, emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a cute chunky robot with a CRT monitor head stamping new pictures onto a giant glowing scroll, while the bee mascot watches happily. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley, emotionally warm.
